name: Season's Best Thumbprint Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: www.hersheys.com
In a large mixer bowl, beat butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add egg and vanilla; blend well.
Stir together flour, cocoa, and salt; add to the butter mixture gradually. Mix in milk until smooth.
Fold in chopped walnuts. Refrigerate dough for at least 1 hour or until firm enough to handle.
Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a cookie sheet lightly.
Shape dough into 1-inch balls and place on prepared cookie sheet. Press thumb into the center of each ball.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until set. Transfer cookies to a wire rack to cool slightly.
To serve, place about ½ teaspoon filling in each thumbprint; top with about ½ teaspoon pie filling.
Store cookies in the refrigerator. Approximately 3 dozen cookies.
VANILLA FILLING: In a small bowl, combine powdered sugar, softened butter or margarine, milk, and vanilla extract until smooth.
CHOCOLATE CREAM FILLING: In a small mixer bowl, beat cream cheese with powdered sugar until well blended. Add cocoa and vanilla extract; mix until smooth.
